discussion_comments.comment_body: Thanks — document preview intentionally omits remark-math because this surface does not wire rehype-katex. Added `markdownRemarkPluginsLite` (GFM + remark-breaks only) and switched the preview component to use it so we stay DRY without pulling in math.
Done — renamed to `MarkdownRemarkPlugins` / `MarkdownRemarkPluginsLite` and updated all usages to match web/CLAUDE.md PascalCase for constants.
`const` modifies constants, and it's recommended to capitalize the first letter.
